mechanism_narrative: A sustained decline in the federal funds rate signals an easing monetary cycle that compresses discount rates applied to equity cash flows, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in easing periods are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A monthly increase in nonfarm payrolls above 100k signals stronger labor market conditions, boosting corporate earnings expectations and generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 20d returns in < 40% of instances where PAYEMS exceeds 100.0, or the signal's IC drops below 0.05 in rolling 3-year windows.

mechanism_narrative: A monthly rise in industrial production above 1.0% indicates expanding manufacturing activity, which drives corporate profits and generates positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX returns are negative in > 50% of cases where INDPRO exceeds 1.0, or the signal's IC falls below 0.03 in rolling 3-year windows.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous growth in GDP and declining unemployment signals robust economic demand, creating positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days through improved corporate revenue outlooks.
failure_condition: The interaction between GDPC1 and UNRATE fails to produce positive returns in > 60% of cases, or the joint signal's IC drops below 0.02 in rolling 3-year windows.

mechanism_narrative: High inflation combined with low interest rates creates uncertainty about future monetary policy, leading to negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days as investors demand higher risk premiums.
failure_condition: SPX returns are positive in > 50% of cases where CPIAUCSL > 2.0 and FEDFUNDS < 1.0, or the interaction's IC falls below -0.03 in rolling 3-year windows.

mechanism_narrative: A monthly increase in housing starts above 600k signals stronger consumer confidence and demand for durable goods, generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX returns are negative in > 50% of cases where HOUST exceeds 600.0, or the signal's IC drops below 0.02 in rolling 3-year windows.

mechanism_narrative: Persistent growth in real sales (RSAFS) indicates strong consumer spending, which drives corporate revenues and generates positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX returns are negative in > 40% of cases where RSAFS shows sustained growth, or the signal's IC falls below 0.03 in rolling 3-year windows.

mechanism_narrative: High unemployment combined with weak industrial production signals economic distress, leading to negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days as investors anticipate corporate earnings declines.
failure_condition: SPX returns are positive in > 50% of cases where UNRATE > 7.0 and INDPRO < 90.0, or the interaction's IC falls below -0.03 in rolling 3-year windows.
